summary: End-to-end frontend testing of the new First-Time Tour overlay (TourOverlay). All 9 acceptance criteria from the review request passed cleanly on a freshly registered user.
critical_code_review_comments: TourOverlay.jsx navigation effect uses an eslint-disable for missing deps (location.pathname, step?.path, navigate). Intentional (only re-nav on step change), but a short comment explaining the omission would help future readers.

Final 'done' step has no `path`, so it inherits the previous step's URL (/account in our run). Matches the spec, but if product wants the last step to land users back on /dashboard, add a `path: '/dashboard'` to the done step.

Minor: TourMount registers the 'shelfsort:replay-tour' listener only once on mount and the open-after-auth effect depends on [loading, user]. Works fine, but if a user logs out and a different user logs in within the same SPA session without a refresh, the tour won't re-fire automatically for the new user unless their localStorage hasn't seen it. Not in scope of this review.
test_credentials: Registered fresh user per run: tour_test_<timestamp>@example.com / hunter2pw via POST /api/auth/register (cookie auth).
seed_data_creation: One ephemeral test user (tour_test_1781411881971@example.com) created via live register endpoint to drive the tour. No other seed data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: TourOverlay is fully working. Selectors verified: tour-overlay, tour-step-<id> (welcome|library|friends|bookclubs|recs|account|done), tour-next, tour-back, tour-skip, tour-dots. TOUR_STEPS length = 7. localStorage key 'shelfsort_tour_seen' set to '1' on both 'Got it' and skip(X). Replay via window.dispatchEvent(new Event('shelfsort:replay-tour')) confirmed to re-open the overlay even after the seen flag is set. The 600ms delay after auth is real — wait for it. Tour does NOT show on the unauthenticated landing (`/`).

verification_details.auto_open_after_register: PASS — overlay appeared on /dashboard within ~1s after fresh register
verification_details.advance_through_all_steps_with_route_cha: PASS — /dashboard -> /library/all -> /friends -> /bookclubs -> /library/recommendations -> /account, every tour-step-<id> visible at its step
verification_details.last_step_got_it_label_and_close: PASS — 'Got it' label on step 7; clicking removes overlay from DOM
verification_details.no_reopen_on_reload: PASS — after reload, no overlay shown within 2.5s
verification_details.step_dots_jump: PASS — clicking dot 4 jumps to bookclubs step and URL becomes /bookclubs
verification_details.skip_button_closes_and_persists: PASS — X button closes and writes '1' to localStorage; no re-open on reload
verification_details.replay_event: PASS — window.dispatchEvent(new Event('shelfsort:replay-tour')) re-opens the overlay even with seen flag set
verification_details.no_tour_for_unauthenticated: PASS — after logout + localStorage clear, landing on `/` shows no tour-overlay within 2.5s
